data.name: Fikra Fast 8B
data.description: Fast, efficient model optimized for real-time chat, basic request routing, and summarization with low to moderate reasoning depth.

data.name: Fikra Pro 20B
data.description: Production-grade model optimized for agentic workflows, retrieval-augmented generation, and tasks requiring strong reasoning capabilities.

data.name: Fikra Pro 120B
data.description: Fikra's most capable model, designed for complex coding, deep analysis, logical deduction, and tasks requiring maximum reasoning depth.
